agenda.title: Project status
agenda.description: Where we are today; blockers; timeline

agenda.title: MVP scope decisions
agenda.description: Decide what we ship in the next iteration

turns.speaker: Sam
turns.text: Kicking off. Goal today: status, MVP decisions, then actions.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.text: Status: backend messages API is in place; next is transcript schema so segmentation can be deterministic.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Frontend note: local proxy route works; we should avoid relying on npx for bootstrapping.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: No blockers, but we need a single canonical MeetingInput JSON so tests can reuse fixtures.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.text: For MVP scope: realtime textbox stream is primary; pasted transcript is fallback; JSON upload is stretch but helps repeatability.

turns.speaker: Sam
turns.text: Decision: adopt v1 schema with schema_version field and RFC3339 timestamps.

turns.speaker: Sam
turns.text: Action items: Alex drafts segmentation rules; Priya wires UI input to the schema.
